learningObjectives: Use basic mouse actions (click, double-click, right-click)
Understand Caps Lock, Num Lock, and basic keys

plainDefinitions.Caps Lock: A key that makes all letters uppercase until turned off.
plainDefinitions.Num Lock: A key that turns the number pad on or off.

realJobUses: Helping users when typing looks wrong
examples: Fixing a user who types ALL CAPS.
analogies: Caps Lock is like a permanent 'Shift' key.
handsOnTasks: Turn Caps Lock on and off and see the difference.
breakFixTasks: Fix a keyboard that 'stopped typing' by checking Caps Lock.
Reconnect a mouse that was unplugged.
automationOpportunities: Later: scripts to detect stuck keys or input issues.
reviewQuestions: What should you check first when a mouse stops working?
